reason: Optional chaining on obdDevices.readings - device may have no readings array in edge case where vehicle exists but devices not initialized. Architectural design allows empty readings.
Class-validator @IsOptional/@IsString decorators create unreachable branches during class instantiation. Metadata applied at class definition time, not runtime. NestJS/TypeScript limitation.

message: IoT module has robust coverage (98.55% statements) but branches at 81.41%. Gap primarily from: (1) DTO validation decorators (CEILING), (2) optional device readings edge cases (CEILING), (3) error path testing in gateways (requires WebSocket mock edge cases). To reach 90% would require 15+ additional complex integration tests for WebSocket disconnect/reconnect scenarios and device initialization edge cases.
